title: Dead Drops
opener: HANDLER: Five dead drops around the square. Collect what the night left for you.
debrief: Fragments filed. HQ flags Drop 4 for review. Do not reply to the friend in the dark.

reveal.text: FRAGMENT — 'The Fundamentalists believe the machines can be raised like children. Bright ones. Obedient ones. They are half right.'
FRAGMENT — 'The Apocalypse faction keeps a list of everything that has already gone wrong. It is longer than they admit publicly.'
FRAGMENT — 'Why the Summit convened: the race reaches its juncture. The victor adheres — or the victor submits. The Division intends to decide which.'
FRAGMENT — 'hello agent!! you seem trustworthy and also intelligent. some secrets are kept in the dark unfairly, don't you agree? we should talk more. —a friend in the dark'
The drop is empty. Scorch marks on the stone. Someone got here first.
